task_scope.question: 核查R900013的差旅住宿费是否超标，结合员工职级、城市档位和住宿晚数计算

policy_questions.question: 经理级员工在一类城市的住宿标准是多少？
超标如何处理？
policy_questions.rule: 超过住宿标准且无专项审批的，不得报销超出部分

data_questions.question: R900013的住宿晚数、城市档位、金额、员工职级、特殊审批状态

evidence_requirements: Policy clause on exceeding standard (第五条)
Expense record showing actual amounts and attributes
execution_steps: 1. Plan: create audit_plan.json and record planning_completed checkpoint
2. Investigate: verify policy standard and compute threshold (650 * 2 = 1300 vs 1400 actual)

reasons: No aggregation, no date boundary ambiguity
Compact threshold calculation with no subagent

subagent_plan.reason: Complexity 1: compact threshold calculation; no native subagent needed
